note: Machine-readable candidate-usecase catalog. sources[] reference ids in data/sources.json. The RUNNABLE stage-defs live in usecases/*.json (only shipped ones); this is the idea/backlog layer that feeds it. status: shipped=live | v1=next build (plan 011) | committed=roadmap | backlog/round-2/round-3=candidate | cut=rejected.

record_shape.name: display name
record_shape.status: shipped | v1 | committed | backlog | round-2 | round-3 | cut
record_shape.jtbd: job-to-be-done, or for unexpected the surprising insight

cut: Octopus appliance-timer — Octopus's own app already does it (no moat)
heritage-flood (NHLE x EA Flood) — audience too narrow
CKAN meta-tool — a means to find datasets, not an answer to a resident's question
Sort My Empty Shop (VOA vacancy x Land Registry) — VOA vacancy data lags months; stale leads
incorporation-velocity 'hiring demand' proxy — noisy/spurious signal, shaky career advice
cycle-safety routing / sport finder / landlord-ownership trace / heritage trails / charity governance — dupes or wrong audience

usecases.name: Founder's Copilot
usecases.jtbd: Where am I, what funding fits, who do I talk to, get me incorporated
usecases.risk: corpus is synthetic demo today; ingest not built

usecases.name: On It
usecases.jtbd: Get me there step-free, hands-free
usecases.risk: canned stub today; live tools + voice planned

usecases.name: Benefits Copilot
usecases.jtbd: What might I be entitled to and exactly where to claim it — without pretending to be the official decision
usecases.risk: wayfinder-not-adjudicator; needs curated scheme corpus + mandatory disclaimer (plan 011)

usecases.name: Sort My Care
usecases.jtbd: find a GP/dentist/pharmacy/urgent care taking patients near me
usecases.risk: NHS 'accepting patients' often stale — caveat; never triage

usecases.name: Sort My Air
usecases.jtbd: is the air near my kid's school / commute bad right now?
usecases.risk: ~400 sensors sparse; guidance links only, not medical advice

usecases.name: Sort My Bin Day
usecases.jtbd: what day is my bin collected, which bin does this go in?
usecases.risk: 33-borough fragmentation -> curated per-borough corpus

usecases.name: Sort My Move
usecases.jtbd: crime/schools/green space/flood/deprivation for a postcode, in one place
usecases.risk: 5-6 heterogeneous APIs; informational only, not a survey

usecases.name: Sort My Say
usecases.jtbd: who's my MP, what bills/petitions affect my area?
usecases.risk: lower daily urgency than the top obvious set

usecases.name: Sort My Circle
usecases.jtbd: community spots / green space beyond my usual streets
usecases.risk: events (Eventbrite/Meetup) are key + ToU gated; ship keyless core first

usecases.name: Sort My Work
usecases.jtbd: jobs/apprenticeships + local labour-market context near me
usecases.risk: keyed job APIs + curated course corpus; DWP Find-a-job has no API

usecases.name: Dentist Desert Alert
usecases.jtbd: movers check schools, never NHS-dentistry capacity — worse and invisible until you're in pain
usecases.risk: directory 'accepting patients' stale — caveat, confirm by phone

usecases.name: Hidden Community Finder
usecases.jtbd: the real social fabric (mutual aid, diaspora, disability/parent groups) isn't on Meetup — it's in the Charity Commission register
usecases.risk: registered address != activity site; lean on the activities text

usecases.name: Cursed Unit Detector
usecases.jtbd: Companies House as site-history — how many businesses registered then dissolved at this shop unit?
usecases.risk: correlation != causation — present as a flag to investigate, never a verdict

usecases.name: Sort My Street
usecases.jtbd: what's reported near me (potholes, lights) and how to report
usecases.risk: Open311 borough coverage patchy; FixMyStreet owns the filing destination

usecases.name: Complaint-to-Campaign
usecases.jtbd: 40 similar reports within 500m = a mandate — link clusters to MPs/petitions
usecases.risk: over-claiming momentum from a small noisy sample — stay descriptive

usecases.name: Planning Radar
usecases.jtbd: the ~21-day comment window and 'a building you love is about to change' hide in planning data
usecases.risk: deadline-field coverage inconsistent per borough — show freshness

usecases.name: Rental Red Flags
usecases.jtbd: sub-E EPC + fast flip + enforcement notice compose a due-diligence check
usecases.risk: silence != safe (missing data); fuzzy cross-schema address matching

usecases.name: Clean-Air Street Chooser
usecases.jtbd: indoor-air proxy (EPC) x outdoor air x price to pick where to live
usecases.risk: least original; ~400 sensors sparse

usecases.name: Sort My Flood Risk
usecases.jtbd: is my street at flood risk, and what do I do?
usecases.risk: zone-level not property-level; route to EA, never a verdict

usecases.name: Sort My Food Hygiene
usecases.jtbd: check the hygiene rating before I order/eat here
usecases.risk: ratings 6-18mo stale; surface inspection date; handle new openings

usecases.name: Sort My Rep
usecases.jtbd: who's my MP/councillor, am I registered, when's the next election
usecases.risk: constituency data lags boundary reviews/by-elections if cached

usecases.name: Sort My Commute
usecases.jtbd: will today's commute work (rail + road + weather)?
usecases.risk: Darwin needs a token; stay 'what's disrupted now', never a forecast

usecases.name: Sort My Crisis Support
usecases.jtbd: I need a foodbank/warm space/emergency grant today
usecases.risk: most foodbanks need a referral — route to 'get referred', show last-verified

usecases.name: Sort My Council Tax Band
usecases.jtbd: check my band and the free challenge process
usecases.risk: no open VOA band API -> corpus; stale banding = false 'you're owed money'

usecases.name: Sort My Scam Check
usecases.jtbd: clone-firm investment-fraud check most people don't know exists
usecases.risk: fuzzy name-match can miss a close mimic — never render a green check

usecases.name: Sort My School Run
usecases.jtbd: gate-time air exposure near my kid's school (route to OSM school locations, keyless)
usecases.risk: sparse sensors — show distance/confidence, not a bare number

usecases.name: Sort My Next Step
usecases.jtbd: local jobs <-> apprenticeship-capacity mismatch, not a job board
usecases.risk: false precision from stale/noisy SOC-to-course classification

usecases.name: Sort My Contract
usecases.jtbd: grants + tenders by sector + postcode + company profile
usecases.risk: Contracts Finder coverage-limited — caveat completeness gaps

usecases.name: Sort My Cycle Now
usecases.jtbd: should I even bother walking to the dock now? (go/no-go, not a route planner)
usecases.risk: dock counts can flip in the 5 min it takes to walk there

usecases.name: Sort My Sweat
usecases.jtbd: free/cheap drop-in sport session starting in the next hour, near me
usecases.risk: OpenActive coverage patchy (opt-in); feed lag can show a full session as open

usecases.name: Sort My Ride Home
usecases.jtbd: before you buy a ticket or leave the venue: will you actually get home tonight?
usecases.risk: Skiddle end-times approximate; last-service engineering changes not always same-day

usecases.name: Sort My Warm Hours
usecases.jtbd: cheapest achievable heating window tonight + nearest warm public space fallback
usecases.risk: a 3am price dip isn't actionable for a vulnerable person — always pair with the physical fallback

usecases.name: Sort My Wander
usecases.jtbd: free, unticketed, obscure heritage near me — invisible to apps because no one earns commission on a blue plaque
usecases.risk: NHLE text is planning/conservation prose — LLM must ground strictly, invent no colour

usecases.name: Sort My Care Group
usecases.jtbd: CQC rates a location, never the chain — a 'Good' can sit inside a troubled corporate group
usecases.risk: CQC has no CH number -> fuzzy match; a false match blames the wrong chain (ship exact-name only)

usecases.name: Sort My True Cost
usecases.jtbd: true occupancy cost of a flat (efficiency x tariff x comparables), not headline rent
usecases.risk: an estimate shown too confidently reads as financial advice — show a range, disclaim

usecases.name: Sort My Ward's Fair Share
usecases.jtbd: which wards funders systematically overlook (grants x deprivation/employment)
usecases.risk: correlation != causation — low grants may reflect low applications, not neglect

usecases.name: Sort My Surplus
usecases.jtbd: route a business's surplus to the foodbank that needs that specific item today
usecases.risk: Give Food London coverage/frequency unverified — discovery tool, not live logistics

usecases.name: Sort My Swim (Storm-Adjusted)
usecases.jtbd: today's wild-swim safety vs a weeks-old EA grade (rain -> sewer-overflow risk)
usecases.risk: heuristic can be wrong either way; a caution flag, never a clearance

usecases.name: Sort My Watchdog Lead
usecases.jtbd: 'worth an FOI' leads for residents/journalists: repeat awards, shared directors, just-under-threshold clusters
usecases.risk: highest defamation risk — read-only joined facts + FOI link, NO suspicion score
